error.storageUseDenied: You cannot use this storage connection
error.storageManageOthersDenied: You cannot manage storage connections created by others
error.storageCredentialInvalid: Stored credential cannot be decrypted, please reset the password

storage.deleteConfirm: Delete connection {name}? Only the connection info is removed; remote files stay untouched.

files.name: Name
files.deleteDirConfirm: Delete folder {name} and all its contents?

storage_files.check_storage_health.description: Verify that the storage connection can log in to the remote server and the base path is accessible; returns storage.connectionOk on success.

storage_files.list_storage_files.description: List files and directories under a path; combine keyword with recursive to search or enumerate the whole subtree.

storage_files.download_storage_file.description: Stream-download the file at the given path.

storage_files.download_storage_archive.description: Package the given directory and all its subdirectories and files into a ZIP archive for download.

storage_files.upload_storage_file.description: Upload a file into the given directory; an existing file with the same name is overwritten.

storage_files.mkdir_storage.description: Create a directory at the given path.

storage_files.rename_storage_entry.description: Rename a file or directory within its parent directory.

storage_files.delete_storage_entry.description: Delete the file or directory at the given path; directories are deleted recursively.

common.path: File or directory path relative to the storage root, starting with /.
common.recursive: Whether to enumerate subdirectories recursively. When true, returns all matches in the subtree.
common.storage_id: Unique ID of the storage connection.

property.new_name: New name. Slashes are not allowed.
property.path: File or directory path relative to the storage root.
